# [network-request] ShareASale

**Network name:** ShareASale (now part of Awin Group, but operated separately)

**Slug:** `shareasale`

**Publisher dashboard URL:** https://account.shareasale.com/

**API documentation URL:** https://account.shareasale.com/a-apitools.cfm

**Account requirements:** Active ShareASale publisher account. API token and
secret generated from the affiliate tools page in the dashboard. No separate
approval.

**Why this is useful for publishers:** Older but widely used US network with
strong direct-merchant relationships in niche verticals. The API is XML and
shows its age, but several publishers maintain ShareASale as a primary
network and would benefit from coverage.
